name: analyzer-panel
description: AnalyzerPanel is reusable for both source and destination sides of the Transform tab. Provides type selector (CSV/JSON/API/PostgreSQL/Supabase), renders the input form, calls the API, and shows CompactSummary with schema selector for multi-schema contracts.

name: mapping-editor
description: MappingEditor is destination-centric: every destination field gets a row. Source dropdown offers unmapped, NULL, constant value, separator, then source fields. Amber warning for unmapped non-nullable destination fields. Constraint badges (PK/FK/UQ/NOT NULL).

name: shared-badges
description: badges.tsx exports ConstraintBadge (PK, FK, UQ, NOT NULL, CHECK) and TypeBadge (integer, text, boolean, timestamp, uuid, json). Uses oklch colors. Reused across DataContractDisplay, MappingEditor, and CompactSummary.

content: Per-panel error handling with dismissable error banners. RawJSON toggle on all contract displays.
Excel uses DataContractDisplay (not ContractDisplay) since excelcontract returns DataContract with one SchemaContract per sheet, not a flat SourceContract.

name: llm-settings
description: LLMSettings is a collapsible panel with provider/model/API key inputs. State lives in TransformTab, passed as LLMConfig prop. Collapsed by default, shows status badge when configured. Provider change resets model to first option.

content: AI Suggest merge preserves user_edited rows and appends any the AI response omitted. user_edited is set to true in updateMapping (MappingEditor) whenever the user changes any field.

name: transform-inputs
description: TransformInputs is an extracted component that manages local text state for the source_fields comma-separated input. Parses to string[] on blur, not on every keystroke, to avoid cursor/value fighting. Same dismiss pattern as constant input (× button → unmapped).
